project_patterns.description: FastAPI routes MUST use explicit Depends(get_container) for ServiceContainer rather than implicit imports to ensure isolated testing and pure architecture.

Heavy ML models (Whisper, BGEM3FlagModel, CrossEncoder) MUST NOT be loaded during initialization. Use _ensure_models() double-checked locking inside the methods to prevent cold-start timeouts in Docker.
Never use requests.get in the async event loop. Use httpx.AsyncClient. For ML model inference, always wrap the blocking code in asyncio.to_thread to maintain event loop non-blocking behavior.
Use BackgroundTasks in FastAPI endpoints (like /api/chat) to log query traces to the Telemetry SQLite database asynchronously without blocking the user response.
